overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a vibrant futuristic district blending traditional Japanese architecture with neon-lit skyscrapers. The character passes by NPCs sitting on benches, a police vehicle, and street vendors under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian promenade with traditional pagoda architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the pedestrian street passing various pedestrians and approaching seating areas

notable_agents.action: woman with distinctive hairstyle standing in the foreground
man in vest walking past the camera

entered.detail: multi-tiered Japanese-style building with red pillars and curved roof
large glowing holographic advertisement floating above the street
row of concrete seating with NPCs sitting
dense network of power lines and cables crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved pedestrian street in a futuristic district, with a prominent traditional Japanese pagoda-style building on the left and holographic billboards visible ahead. The area is moderately populated with pedestrians walking in the same direction.

events.description: camera slows down and approaches the bench with two seated NPCs for closer observation

agents.ego_description: approaching and closely observing two NPCs sitting on a bench, focusing on their idle activities

notable_agents.action: man in cap and jacket examining a handheld device while sitting on bench
man in red tank top and purple pants sitting and looking around

entered.detail: futuristic vending kiosk with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to a concrete bench where two NPCs are seated, one focused on a handheld device. The traditional pagoda building remains visible in the background while the camera focuses on the detailed character interactions at close range.

events.description: character turns right at the corner, transitioning from pedestrian plaza to street edge

agents.ego_description: turning the corner and walking along the street edge, passing by a seated NPC with flowers

notable_agents.action: man with green hair sitting on bench holding flowers and looking toward camera

entered.detail: tall digital advertisement display showing 'REAL WATER' with a man's face
futuristic police vehicle parked on the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character rounds a corner, passing a digital billboard advertising 'Real Water' and approaching a parked police vehicle. The environment transitions from the plaza to a street edge with different architectural elements becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with police presence and towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and massive holographic advertisements overhead
camera pans back down and turns left to face the traditional pagoda building again

agents.ego_description: walking past a police vehicle, looking up at the surrounding mega-structures, then turning to survey the area

notable_agents.action: police officer in blue uniform standing next to the patrol car
police car parked on the side of the street with 'POLICE' markings

entered.detail: law enforcement officer standing beside the vehicle
towering buildings covered in large digital screens and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character passes a police car and officer on the left, then looks up at the massive skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The camera pans to show the scale of the futuristic cityscape before turning back toward the traditional architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: street market with clothing vendors and food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through a bustling market area browsing vendor stalls on the left side

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at clothing stall with mannequin displaying jackets
woman in yellow jacket and hard hat standing at market stall

entered.detail: market stall with canopy displaying clothing items on mannequins
white tent canopy covering a food vendor area with tables
white metal staircase and ramp structure crossing over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an active street market with various vendor stalls selling clothing and food under canopies. The crowd density increases as the character approaches a pedestrian stair structure in the distance.

events.description: character approaches striped crosswalk area with pedestrian markings

agents.ego_description: approaching the crosswalk and walking toward the traditional gate structure at the intersection

notable_agents.action: man in gray suit walking toward the camera direction
woman with purple hair walking in same direction as ego

entered.detail: Japanese-style entrance gate with red pillars and signage marking the district boundary
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing markings on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a crosswalk with striped markings, walking toward a traditional Japanese gate structure that marks the entrance to another district. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions while futuristic vehicles pass on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic district that blends traditional Japanese architecture with the overwhelming scale of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins along a paved pedestrian street beside a prominent pagoda-style building, moving closer to NPCs resting on a concrete bench as holographic billboards flicker ahead. As the character rounds a corner past a digital advertisement for Real Water, the scene shifts toward a street edge where a parked police vehicle and officer stand beneath towering skyscrapers draped in massive holographic displays. The camera then glides through a dense street market filled with vendor stalls and colorful canopies before the environment opens up toward a pedestrian stair structure. Finally, the movement leads across a striped crosswalk and toward a traditional Japanese gate, with futuristic vehicles streaming past on the adjacent road.
